title: Used agricultural equipment purchases
doc_html:
§1160.  Used agricultural equipment purchases

The secretary shall be allowed to purchase used agricultural and industrial equipment at public auction as provided by R.S. 39:1554(G)(2).

Acts 1985, No. 788, §3, eff. July 22, 1985.
